title: [Griffin's Keen, Inner Trail]
description: The sound of rushing water provides the bass for the piercing shriek of the wind.  From time to time a sharp squawk or a chorus of shrill caws provide percussion.  The steep, ice-laden trail hugs the mountainside closely as it winds around huge wrinkles in the rock face.

wayto.4602: ;e if (UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode == 'wait') or ((UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode != 'run') and ((XMLData.encumbrance_value > 50) or ((Skills.survival < 50) and not Spell['Haste'].active?))); sleep 0.2; echo 'trying not to slip...'; sleep 4; end; move 'down'
wayto.4604: ;e if (UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode == 'wait') or ((UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode != 'run') and ((XMLData.encumbrance_value > 50) or ((Skills.survival < 50) and not Spell['Haste'].active?))); sleep 0.2; echo 'trying not to slip...'; sleep 4; end; move 'up'
